objective: Objectif: Sur le token ZENUSDC avec le timeframe 1h, j'utilisera les indicateurs EMA et BOLLINGER avec un filtre horaire de liquidite adaptatif pour mesurer la trend, l'AROON pour trouver des points tops, SMA pour suivre une tendance moyenne, MACD pour détecter la dynamique des changements, ainsi que ROC et VOLUME_OSCILLATOR pour identifier les moments de transition. J'adapterai ensuite le SL/TP en fonction du risque volatilite, en utilisant un filtre anti-faux-signaisls (confirmation inverse partielle) pour minimiser l'impact des faux signal. Enfin, je vais tester une logique inversee sur la RSI et exiger une confirmation contrarienne partielle pour éviter les formulations generiques de type 'RSI<30/RSI>70'.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining EMA and Bollinger Bands with ATR for trend identification, Aroon to find tops, SMA for following a trending mean, MACD for detecting momentum shifts, ROC and volume oscillator for transition points. Filtering out false signals with an anti-fake signal filter. Adapting stop loss/take profit based on risk management, inverting RSI and requiring confirmation in contrarian partial reversal.

code.validation_error: [SIG001] `for i in range(...)` interdit dans la logique Builder.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The proposed strategy aims to identify trends, locate tops and manage risk using multiple indicators like EMA, Bollinger Bands with ATR. The RSI is also used in an inverse manner for contrarian views. However, the efficacy of this approach may be limited due to overfitting or other unforeseen market conditions. Additionally, a poor return could stem from factors like changes in market dynamics or incorrect parameter settings. If such results are achieved, modifying some parameters (like period lengths) might yield better outcomes.
[Backup plan] 1. To address weaknesses, I would perform backtesting on different sets of data to validate the robustness of strategy across various conditions.2. In case of poor returns, I'd investigate why the current approach is not working and whether it can be modified or abandoned for a new one (e.g., using alternative indicators).3. For mediocre results with low Sharpe ratio, I would try optimizing the parameters to achieve better risk-adjusted performance.
